title: Implement transcript_3 using CBOR encoding of TH_2, ciphertext/plaintext, credential per Python and RFC
description: Add transcript_3(th_2: &[u8; 32], input: &[u8], cred: &[u8]) that builds input with cbor2 equivalent (cbor dumps of each part) then compute_th to match test vectors in edhoc.rs and python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py. Handle both plaintext and ciphertext cases.
